chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: 25 - عن أبي عبد الله (ع) قال: إنّ الله يذود المؤمنَ عمّا يكره ممّا يشتهي كما يذود الرجُل البعيرَ عن إبله ليس منها.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 25. It has been narrated that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Allah keeps a believer away from what He dislikes even if he (the believer) longs for it, just as a man keeps a camel away from a flock it does not belong to.
